@@ -1,0 +1,178 @@
+using UniversityCourseCatalog.Models;
+
+namespace UniversityCourseCatalog.Services;
+
+public class CatalogService
+{
+    private readonly List<Department> _departments;
+    private readonly List<Instructor> _instructors;
+    private readonly List<Course> _courses;
+
+    public CatalogService()
+    {
+        _departments = InitDepartments();
+        _instructors = InitInstructors();
+        _courses = InitCourses();
+    }
+
+    // Departments
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Department> GetAllDepartments() => _departments;
+
+    public Department? GetDepartment(int id) => _departments.FirstOrDefault(d => d.Id == id);
+
+    // Courses
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetAllCourses() => _courses;
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetFeaturedCourses() =>
+        _courses.Where(c => c.IsFeatured).ToList();
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> GetCoursesByDepartment(int departmentId) =>
+        _courses.Where(c => c.DepartmentId == departmentId).ToList();
+
+    public Course? GetCourse(int id) => _courses.FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);
+
+    public IReadOnlyList<Course> SearchCourses(string? searchTerm, int? departmentId, int? credits)
+    {
+        var query = _courses.AsEnumerable();
+
+        if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(searchTerm))
+        {
+            var term = searchTerm.Trim();
+            query = query.Where(c =>
+                c.Title.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.CourseCode.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Description.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ||
+                c.Instructor.Name.Contains(term, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));
+        }
+
+        if (departmentId.HasValue && departmentId.Value > 0)
+            query = query.Where(c => c.DepartmentId == departmentId.Value);
+
+        if (credits.HasValue && credits.Value > 0)
+            query = query.Where(c => c.Credits == credits.Value);
+
+        return query.OrderBy(c => c.CourseCode).ToList();
+    }
+
+    // Enrollment
+
+    public bool SubmitEnrollmentRequest(EnrollmentRequest request)
+    {
+        var course = GetCourse(request.CourseId);
+        if (course is null || course.CurrentEnrollment >= course.MaxEnrollment)
+            return false;
+
+        course.CurrentEnrollment++;
+        return true;
+    }
+
+    // Seed data
+
+    private static List<Department> InitDepartments() =>
+    [

data.content:
The Blazor Web App is ready. Here's what was built:

**Project structure:**
```
UniversityCourseCatalog/
├── Models/          — Department, Course, Instructor, EnrollmentRequest
├── Services/        — CatalogService (in-memory, 6 depts, 15 courses)
├── Components/
│   ├── Pages/
│   │   ├── Home.razor          — Featured courses + department cards
│   │   ├── Courses.razor       — Searchable/filterable course table
│   │   ├── CourseDetail.razor   — Full details + instructor bio + related courses
│   │   └── Enroll.razor         — Enrollment request form with validation
│   └── Layout/                  — Updated nav with Catalog branding
└── Program.cs                   — Registers CatalogService as singleton
```

**Key features:**
- **Homepage** — department cards with links, featured courses with enroll buttons
- **Course browser** — live search by title/code/instructor, filter by department & credits
- **Course detail** — full description, schedule, location, availability, instructor bio, related courses sidebar
- **Enrollment form** — standard HTML form with DataAnnotations validation, success confirmation
- **Interactive Server** rendering (ideal for fast intranet), no authentication

Run with: `cd UniversityCourseCatalog && dotnet run`
